findings.title: FreeScout Mail2Shell — Zero-Click RCE via Crafted Email
findings.summary: A zero-click RCE in FreeScout allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary code by sending a single crafted email to any configured mailbox, bypassing a previous patch via Unicode zero-width space.

findings.title: Cisco Secure FMC — Two Max-Severity Flaws Allow Unauthenticated Root Access
findings.summary: Two CVSS 10.0 vulnerabilities in Cisco Secure FMC allow unauthenticated remote attackers to bypass authentication and execute arbitrary Java code as root, also affecting Cisco Security Cloud Control.

findings.title: WordPress User Registration Plugin — Actively Exploited Privilege Escalation
findings.summary: A critical privilege escalation flaw in the User Registration & Membership plugin (60K+ installs) is being actively exploited to create admin accounts, with over 200 attacks blocked in 24 hours.

findings.title: Coruna iOS Exploit Kit — Spyware-Grade Chains Now Used for Crypto Theft
findings.summary: Google GTIG revealed a 23-exploit iOS kit called Coruna with five full exploit chains, now repurposed from nation-state espionage to cryptocurrency theft via fake gambling and crypto sites.

findings.title: CISA KEV: Rockwell ICS, Hikvision, and Apple iOS Flaws Added
findings.summary: CISA added five vulnerabilities to KEV on March 5 including Rockwell ICS credential flaw (CVE-2021-22681), Hikvision auth bypass (CVE-2017-7921), and three Apple iOS exploits used by the Coruna kit.

findings.title: UAT-9244 — Chinese APT Targets South American Telecoms with Three New Implants
findings.summary: Cisco Talos disclosed UAT-9244, a China-linked APT targeting South American telecoms since 2024 with three new implants: TernDoor (Windows), PeerTime (Linux), and BruteEntry (network edge devices).

noted.summary: Self-propagating JavaScript worm vandalized Wikipedia pages and modified user scripts across multiple wikis.
Healthcare IT breach exposed health data of 3.4 million patients.
